name: Swamp Slime (Halloween)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare green Jell-O according to package instructions.
2. Pour some into clear plastic containers.
3. Set aside additional Jell-O and let it start to solidify.
4. Add gummy bugs to the partially set Jell-O.
5. Beat the remaining Jell-O until frothy.
6. Top with the frothy mixture on top of the slime.
7. Allow to set completely.
